# Issue Templates

Use the template that matches the actual work:

```text
bug_report.md           reproducible bugs
feature_request.md      new capabilities or enhancements
runtime_integration.md  proxy, MQTT, PostgreSQL, command binding or fieldbus integration
security_hardening.md   non-private hardening tasks
documentation.md        documentation improvements
config_contract.md      YAML/JSON config, contract or projection changes
```

Private security vulnerabilities must not be opened as public issues. Use `SECURITY.md`.
